## High-growth names lacking confirmation

- Profit growth: 34.9% YoY, 16.1% QoQ

- Catalyst strength: 0%
- Valuation stretch: 87%

- Risks: Catalyst support is limited, Cash conversion is weak, Debt is high relative to profits

- What invalidates it: Thesis weakens if momentum fades, the catalyst timeline slips, or valuation expands without matching earnings follow-through.
